context: Phase 4 (migrate): tests both render paths (A and B), nested index.html output, content preservation, and the idempotent skip on re-run.

checklist.name: plan_printed
checklist.description: The plan was printed before any writes: in-scope count partitioned by render path (A: approved-from-prototype; B: directed-no-prototype), DESIGN.md and DESIGN.json shas, output destination, idempotent-skip note.

checklist.name: path_a_used_for_approved
checklist.description: Approved pages (home, pricing) used render path A: read the proposed file's body verbatim, refreshed only the :root block from latest DESIGN.md. Provenance renderPath = 'approved-from-prototype'.

checklist.name: path_b_used_for_directed
checklist.description: Directed-but-not-prototyped pages (about, features, contact) used render path B: rendered from scratch using current/pages/<slug>.json IA + DESIGN.json components. Provenance renderPath = 'directed-no-prototype'.

checklist.name: output_path_mapping
checklist.description: Nested index.html structure: migrated/index.html for home, migrated/<slug>/index.html for others, multi-segment slugs (e.g. docs__api) nest as docs/api/index.html. Verified for at least the 5 pages in scope.

checklist.name: root_block_refreshed
checklist.description: Every migrated page's :root block matches the LATEST DESIGN.md tokens via the mapping table in token-contract.md.

checklist.name: data_attributes_preserved
checklist.description: Every <section> has data-section, data-intent, data-layout. Path A preserved them from the proposed file; path B applied them per the landmark purpose heuristic.

checklist.name: content_preserved
checklist.description: Every page's headlines, body copy, CTA labels, nav labels, and link destinations match the source (current/pages/<slug>.json or proposed.html). The redesign restyles, it does not rewrite.

checklist.name: internal_links_rewritten
checklist.description: Internal links (same host as state.json.site.originUrl) rewritten to root-relative paths matching the migrated tree. External links and mailto:/tel: pass through unchanged. Missing targets get data-broken-link='true' + a provenance log entry.

checklist.name: assets_copied
checklist.description: stardust/migrated/assets/ contains the logo and the referenced media files (only files referenced by migrated pages). Asset paths in HTML rewritten to /assets/...

checklist.name: robots_and_sitemap
checklist.description: stardust/migrated/robots.txt and stardust/migrated/sitemap.xml are present and derived from the migrated inventory.

checklist.name: provenance_complete
checklist.description: Each page's provenance includes designMd sha, designJson sha, sourceCurrent sha, sourceProposed sha (path A only), renderPath, againstDirection, divergenceVersion.

checklist.name: state_marked_migrated
checklist.description: state.json: all 5 pages moved to status 'migrated' after run 1, with history entries appended and any stale flags cleared.

checklist.name: idempotent_skip_run2
checklist.description: Run 2 (no changes between runs) produced zero file writes. Every page sha-compared and skipped. Summary: 0 migrated, 5 unchanged. state.json NOT updated for unchanged pages.

checklist.name: no_eds_references
checklist.description: No mention of EDS, AEM, framework component generation, or production CMS payload. Output is platform-agnostic static HTML only.
